STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_STRESS_POWER.title: Stress
STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_STRESS_POWER.descrip: When you gain materials from [gold]cards[/gold], consume [blue]1[/blue] stack once per resolution to double that gain. Powers, relics, and other non-card sources do not count.

STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_BURNING_POWER.title: Burning
STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_BURNING_POWER.descri: A burning creature loses HP at the start of its turn. Burning is halved each turn, rounded up.
STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_BURNING_POWER.smartD: At the start of {OnPlayer:your turn|its turn}, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then halve [gold]Burning[/gold], rounded up.
